nasb.text: “You shall also take the fat from the ram and the fat tail, and the fat that covers the entrails and the lobe of the liver, and the two kidneys and the fat that is on them and the right thigh (for it is a ram of ordination),

esv.text: “You shall also take the fat from the ram and the fat tail and the fat that covers the entrails, and the long lobe of the liver and the two kidneys with the fat that is on them, and the right thigh (for it is a ram of ordination),

cnv.text: 你要從這公綿羊身上取出脂油和肥尾巴，遮蓋內臟的脂油和肝葉、兩個腰子和腰子上的脂油，以及右腿，因為這是授聖職的時候，所要獻的公綿羊，

ccb.text: “你要取出羊的脂肪、肥尾巴、遮盖内脏的脂肪、肝叶、两个肾脏和附在上面的脂肪以及右腿，因为这是授圣职时所献的羊。
